query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN dteNewListing IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasListing, SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasTermination FROM properfyProperties;
